Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Continued To Feb-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court Against Defendant
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Dana M. Perlman, Esq., appearing through CourtCall for Plaintiff, ALLIANCE LAUNDRY SYSTEMS LLC,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant PAUL YBARRA ROBERTSON, DBA HALLOWAYS WASH AND THE LAUNDRY BASKET,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $74,946.86
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,576.77
Attorney's Fees: $4,547.50
Costs: $1,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $88,071.13

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court Against Defendant
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Continued To Dec-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
